# ForwardingDecision

**Enumeration**

Possible decisions in response to the notification forwarding permission prompt.

## Declaration

```swift
enum ForwardingDecision
```

## Overview

When your app calls [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotificationCenter/requestForwarding(for:)], the system prompts the person to choose which apps can forward notifications to your accessory.

## Identifying the decision

- **ForwardingDecision.allow**: An option that indicates the person allows notifications from all applicable apps.
- **ForwardingDecision.deny**: An option that indicates the person doesn’t allow notification forwarding.
- **ForwardingDecision.limited**: An option that indicates the person allows notifications from a selected subset of apps.
- **ForwardingDecision.undetermined**: An option that indicates the person dismissed the prompt without responding.

## Accessing the decision’s description

- **description**: A textual representation of the decision.

## Authorization

- **AccessoryNotificationCenter**: A class that enables an app to request permission for notification forwarding.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
